notes: 6th CONSECUTIVE INCONCLUSIVE_no_helper for wrtn (after #976/#979/#980/#981 + #976 retry). Probed both wrtn.ai tabs in CDP-exposed Chrome (port 9222) via Runtime.evaluate. helperKeys=[] on both tabs. window.__APF_HELPER__=undefined, window.__plantynet__=undefined. Tab1 (https://wrtn.ai/c/6a06cccf248440ee3cde92b3) WebSocket is native ([native code]). Tab2 (https://wrtn.ai/c/6a06753e3853cbb594752387) WebSocket wrapped only by a leftover developer capture shim (window.__cap.push) — NOT an APF helper. iter16 ACK+broadcast envelope upgrade is irrelevant: even a perfect dual-frame s2c sequence cannot reach the page because no helper is present to receive injected frames. The blocker is upstream — APF helper-injection mechanism is not active in this Chrome instance for wrtn.ai. RECOMMENDATION TO DEV: STOP further wrtn iterations until a helper-injection design exists (CRX content script with web_accessible_resources for wrtn.ai, MV3 main-world script registration, or proxy-injected response header for *.wrtn.ai bundle). Continued envelope iterations consume cycles without testing the engine.
